title: eugenia neonitida
intro: Eugenia neonitida, also known as the Malabar murraya or orange jessamine, is a flowering evergreen plant native to tropical regions. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Ayurvedic medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The Eugenia neonitida has been found to have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, cold, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a range of health-promoting applications.
